narrative:
Bay Village-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,045 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
